head: 31dc201
currentUserCommand: Use CODEX_STARTS_HERE.md as the controlling prompt for a one-shot Codex worker on a clean prepared base. Continue PR #1 on branch codex/upper-glacis-recovery-tools. Produce the next scratch upper-glacis experiment only if it materially tests a true multi-region shared-vertex visible skin. Preserve silhouette and manifold assembly. Do not claim visual acceptance without cloud/Sense evidence.
forbiddenStalePremise: Do not treat a simulated worker, a tool-list smoke, or a local-only check as completed implementation.
intendedMutation: Write the required one-shot Command Center artifacts only; do not mutate exporters, geometry, generated models, review anchors, PR state, or cloud state.
whyThisSatisfiesCommand: The controlling prompt requires reading docs/doctrine/scratch-mode.md before mutation. That file is missing in this checkout, so model/exporter mutation would violate the intake gate. The compliant result is a blocked artifact set with evidence preserved.

blockers.detail: CODEX_STARTS_HERE.md and docs/prospector/upper-glacis-failure-quarantine-20260710.md both list docs/doctrine/scratch-mode.md as required canon, but the file does not exist in this checkout.
npm run build failed because esbuild-wasm is not installed in node_modules.
npm test failed because package.json does not define a test script.
